title: HapRay tool-result v1
description: Machine-readable CLI exit contract (Agent / automation). Prefer writing to a file: beside -o as hapray-tool-result.json, or --result-file. --machine-json is stdout fallback when the file cannot be written or no output path exists.

action.description: Subcommand or action name when applicable (e.g. perf, static, hap).

success.description: false = failure; null = completed but outcome not reduced to a boolean (e.g. legacy actions returning None).

outputs.description: May include hapray_tool_result_path (written contract file), hapray_tool_result_sink when stdout fallback. optimization_detector adds report_files, reports_by_format, formats for -o/-f outputs.
